scope: dashboard Praxis learning / ACP adapter visual consistency
issue: Light paper-theme cards and CTA blocks were leaking into the black terminal workbench UI.
fixes: Rebuilt Praxis learning report rows as dcLearningReportCard/dcLearningReportStack instead of raw dcReportRow markup.
Darkened Praxis learning report cards, dashboard report rows, MCP metric cards, agent mini cards, adapter cards, primary buttons, adapter CTA buttons, and topbar CTA.
Added mobile dashboard collapse/wrap guards for adapter grids, hero actions, endpoint code, reports, and long runtime text.
Added regression guards to npm run test:praxis-status for public Praxis leak, dark report cards, dashboard dark cards, mobile collapse, and dark buttons.

scenarioMatrix.intent: Reject user screenshot regression where blocked/learning reports render as large white/gray slabs.
scenarioMatrix.signal: 8 learning report cards computed with rgb(16, 16, 16) background.

scenarioMatrix.intent: Catch generic dashboard rows/metric cards that still use paper theme.
scenarioMatrix.signal: Dashboard report rows and MCP cards computed dark, lightLeaks=0.

scenarioMatrix.intent: Mobile hostile viewport should not clip horizontally.
ACP adapter surface remains visible for Hermes/OpenClaw.
Static regression guard for future CSS drift.

scenarioMatrix.evidence: npm run lint; npm run build; npm run test:hermes-acp; npm run test:praxis-learning; npm run test:praxis-learning-loop

remainingRisks: This pass fixes dashboard/Praxis learning visual inconsistency. Other routes may still have unrelated legacy CSS from prior redesign work and should be audited route-by-route if user reports them.
